title: Who Is Alireza Tangsiri, the Latest Iranian Commander Targeted by Israel?
summary_full: Israel said it killed the naval commander, Alireza Tangsiri, in an airstrike on Thursday morning. Iran has not commented.
summary_public: Israel said it killed the naval commander, Alireza Tangsiri, in an airstrike on Thursday morning. Iran has not commented.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel said it killed the naval commander

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Latest Iranian Commander Targeted by Israel
